nodes.title: Investment Memo: Northstar Analytics
nodes.content: Recommendation: proceed to partner diligence with valuation discipline.

nodes.title: Market Analysis
nodes.content: Mid-market finance teams face fragmented forecasting workflows; a focused analytics wedge has credible demand.

nodes.title: Financial Analysis
nodes.content: Revenue growth is promising, but the current burn profile requires milestone-based financing.

nodes.title: Competition Analysis
nodes.content: The company differentiates through workflow integration while competing with suites and point solutions.

nodes.title: Risk Analysis
nodes.content: Primary risks are sales-cycle length, platform dependency, and valuation; diligence gates are defined for each.
